title: Shneiderman's Human-Centered AI Principles
description: A visual breakdown of Ben Shneiderman's key principles for designing AI systems that prioritize human needs, control, and responsibility.
relationships: Human Control should govern Automation to ensure Safety & Reliability, which is achieved through Transparency & Understandability, all of which are foundational for establishing clear Responsibility & Accountability and ensuring Fairness & Non-Discrimination.
